name: Avo MCP Skill Reference Taxonomy (slim)
_comment: Curated reference taxonomy demonstrating canonical patterns for naming, funnels, deep events, properties, constraints, and metrics. Derived from a real Avo seed plan; trimmed to the smallest set that still shows every pattern the agent needs.

events.name: Signup Started
events._pattern: Funnel start event. Captures intent before any work; pairs with Signup Step Completed and Signup Completed.
events.description: Event sent when the user clicks a signup button somewhere on the landing page

Signup Button Location.description: The location of the signup button on the page

events.name: Signup Step Completed
events._pattern: Funnel milestone. Reuses an `X Step Name` + `X Step Index` pattern; constraints on Index (minimum 1).
events.description: Event sent when a user completes a step in the signup process.

Signup Step Name.description: The name of the signup step the user just completed

Signup Step Index.description: The index of the signup step starting with 1.

events.name: Signup Completed
events._pattern: Funnel completion event. Carries an outcome property (Authentication Method) and a user property (Email). Shows the event-vs-user property split. Email is tagged `pii` — it is included as the canonical user-property example, and the tag exists so downstream consumers can apply the workspace's PII handling rules (GDPR/CCPA consent, retention, right to erasure). Substitute a hashed user id when raw email is not appropriate for your context.
events.description: Event sent when a user has successfully signed up

Authentication Method.description: The method the user used to sign up or log in

Email.description: The user's email address. Tagged `pii` — must be handled per the workspace's PII rules (GDPR/CCPA consent, retention limits, right to erasure). Substitute a hashed identifier when raw email is not appropriate for the destination.

events.name: Purchase Started
events._pattern: Funnel start. Demonstrates that funnel events can share a common cluster of properties (cart amounts) inherited across all steps.
events.description: Event sent when a user clicks the button to proceed to checkout

Product Count.description: The total number of products in this cart. Including multiple items of the same product.

Cart Amount Total.description: The total amount of the cart, including shipping and taxes

Cart Amount Tax.description: The total amount of tax in the cart

Cart Amount Shipping.description: The total amount for shipping of the cart

Cart Amount Revenue.description: The total amount of revenue for this cart. Revenue is defined as Total Amount - Shipping - Tax

events.name: Purchase Step Completed
events._pattern: Funnel milestone. Inherits the cart amount cluster from Purchase Started and adds the step pattern (Step Name + Step Index).
events.description: Event sent when the user completes a step in the checkout process

Product Count.description: The total number of products in this cart. Including multiple items of the same product.

Cart Amount Total.description: The total amount of the cart, including shipping and taxes

Cart Amount Tax.description: The total amount of tax in the cart

Cart Amount Shipping.description: The total amount for shipping of the cart

Cart Amount Revenue.description: The total amount of revenue for this cart. Revenue is defined as Total Amount - Shipping - Tax

Purchase Step Name.description: The name of the checkout step the user just completed

Purchase Step Index.description: The number for this checkout step in the order. First step is number 1.

events.name: Purchase Completed
events._pattern: Funnel completion. Inherits the cart cluster and adds outcome properties (Payment Method, Coupon Code).
events.description: Event sent when a checkout has successfully been completed

Product Count.description: The total number of products in this cart. Including multiple items of the same product.

Cart Amount Total.description: The total amount of the cart, including shipping and taxes

Cart Amount Tax.description: The total amount of tax in the cart

Cart Amount Shipping.description: The total amount for shipping of the cart

Cart Amount Revenue.description: The total amount of revenue for this cart. Revenue is defined as Total Amount - Shipping - Tax

Payment Method.description: The method the user selected to make payment with

Coupon Code.description: The coupon code the user used for the checkout, if any

events.name: Page Viewed
events._pattern: Canonical non-funnel state event. Reusable across the product; segmented by `Page Name` / `Page Category`. Demonstrates the `Previous X` pattern for navigation context and nullable types.
events.description: Event sent when a user lands on a new page on web or screen on mobile

Page Name.description: The name of the page related to this event

Page Category.description: The category of the page/screen related to this event

Page URL.description: The URL of the page related to this event. Only relevant for web events

Previous Page Name.description: The name of the page/screen that the user navigated from

Previous Page Category.description: The category of the page/screen the user navigated from

Previous Page URL.description: The URL of the page/screen the user navigated from. Only relevant on web

events.name: Search Result Selected
events._pattern: Deep event: one action with multiple segmenting properties. Demonstrates `X Count`, `X Index` (with minimum constraint), and `Selected X` naming.
events.description: Event sent when a user selects a search result

Search Term.description: The search term in the search input when this event is sent

Search Result Count.description: The number of search results that the user received when making the search

Search Input Location.description: The location of the search input related to this event

Selected Search Result Index.description: The index of the search result interacted with. Top one has index 1.

Selected Search Result Title.description: The title of the search result that the user selected

events.name: Profile Configured
events._pattern: Deep event for a configuration action. Demonstrates the alternative to fragmenting one action into many shallow events (`Profile Picture Updated` / `User Name Updated` / `Birth Date Updated` as separate events). One event carries `Profile Configuration Action` (Add / Update / Remove) and `Profile Configured Item` (which profile field) so analysts can answer both 'how often is the profile configured?' and 'which item is changed most often?' from a single event stream. Modeled after `Product List Configured` in the original full-plan seed.
events.description: Event sent when a user configures an item on their profile (adding, updating, or removing a profile field).

Profile Configuration Action.description: How the user configured the profile field: did they add a new value, update an existing one, or remove one?

Profile Configured Item.description: Which profile field the user configured.

UeJgCO1cu.name: Conversion: Signup Started -> Signup Completed
UeJgCO1cu._pattern: Canonical conversion metric name: `Conversion: <Start Event> -> <End Event>`. Self-documenting.
UeJgCO1cu.description: The conversion rate from starting signup by clicking the signup button on the landing page to successfully completing signup. Useful to understand the performance of the signup flow and compare it to industry standards.

pgIzzWcjf.name: Signups by authentication method
pgIzzWcjf._pattern: Canonical segmentation metric: one event grouped by one property. Name describes the segmentation, not the events.
pgIzzWcjf.description: Segmenting signups by authentication method is useful to understand which signup methods are popular and which should be featured on the signup page.
